title: Trail Counting Walk
description: A number-newsroom walking coach that sends kids outside to count steps, birds, doors, and playful scavenger targets.
learningGoals: Practice counting real objects and events in the wild
Remember and report numbers at spoken check-ins
Compare collected numbers to identify more and fewer
Build observation stamina during an outdoor walk
interactionModel: follow each spoken outdoor counting mission, remember and say the total at check-in, then tap the large current-step card
feedbackModel: excited spoken number-news reports with tick, sparkle, and tada SFX; every reported total becomes a headline

modes.title: Counting Walk
modes.skill: counting, remembering, and comparing outdoor totals

modes.title: Number Race
modes.skill: counting observed categories to target numbers

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
